ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graph_definitions" (
  "graph_definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph definition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the graph definition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graph definition */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and constraints defined in the graph definition */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the graph definition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph definition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph definition was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the graph definition */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the graph definition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the graph definition (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_definition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., patient, provider, device) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "graph_definition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graph definition that the resource belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the resource */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_graph_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_definition_id") REFERENCES graph_definitions ("graph_definition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "graph_definition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graph definition that the metadata belongs to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource that the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the metadata entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_graph_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_definition_id") REFERENCES graph_definitions ("graph_definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "entity1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first entity in the relationship */,
  "entity2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second entity in the relationship */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., patient-provider, provider-device) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_entity1_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity1_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_entity2_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity2_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that the permission belongs to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource that the permission applies to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that the user is allowed to perform on the resource (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_definition_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "graph_definition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graph definition that the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_definition_versions_graph_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_definition_id") REFERENCES graph_definitions ("graph_definition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource that the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance entry */,
  "graph_definition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graph definition that the provenance belongs to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource that the provenance belongs to */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity that performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity that was performed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the activity was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provenance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provenance entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who created the provenance entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the provenance entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provenance_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provenance_graph_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_definition_id") REFERENCES graph_definitions ("graph_definition_id")
)
